subject.labelJa: オペレーションズ・リサーチ
subject.descriptionZh: 线性与连续优化、排队论、博弈论、库存管理与决策分析。
subject.descriptionJa: 線形・連続最適化、待ち行列、ゲーム理論、在庫管理、意思決定分析。
subject.descriptionEn: Linear and continuous optimization, queueing theory, game theory, inventory management, and decision analysis.

Operations-Research.Optimization.subject: Operations-Research
Operations-Research.Optimization.descriptionZh: 线性规划、优化建模、运输问题与经典 OR 求解方法；离散组合优化归入“图论与组合优化”。
Operations-Research.Optimization.descriptionJa: 線形計画、最適化モデリング、輸送問題、古典的なOR解法。離散的な組合せ最適化は「グラフ理論・組合せ最適化」に分類する。
Operations-Research.Optimization.descriptionEn: Linear programming, optimization modeling, transportation problems, and classic OR solution methods. Discrete combinatorial optimization lives under Graph Theory & Combinatorial Optimization.

Operations-Research.Queueing-Theory.subject: Operations-Research
Operations-Research.Queueing-Theory.descriptionZh: 排队模型、到达过程、服务过程与系统性能。
Operations-Research.Queueing-Theory.descriptionJa: 待ち行列モデル、到着過程、サービス過程、システム性能。
Operations-Research.Queueing-Theory.descriptionEn: Queueing models, arrival processes, service processes, and system performance.

Operations-Research.Game-Theory.subject: Operations-Research
Operations-Research.Game-Theory.descriptionZh: 零和博弈、鞍点、纳什均衡与策略互动。
Operations-Research.Game-Theory.descriptionJa: ゼロ和ゲーム、鞍点、ナッシュ均衡、戦略的相互作用。
Operations-Research.Game-Theory.descriptionEn: Zero-sum games, saddle points, Nash equilibria, and strategic interaction.

Operations-Research.Inventory-Management.subject: Operations-Research
Operations-Research.Inventory-Management.descriptionZh: 订货批量、补货策略、持有成本与数量折扣。
Operations-Research.Inventory-Management.descriptionJa: 発注量、補充方策、保管費用、数量割引。
Operations-Research.Inventory-Management.descriptionEn: Order quantities, replenishment policies, holding costs, and quantity discounts.

Operations-Research.Decision-Analysis.subject: Operations-Research
Operations-Research.Decision-Analysis.descriptionZh: 多准则决策、层次分析法与判断一致性。
Operations-Research.Decision-Analysis.descriptionJa: 多基準意思決定、階層分析法、判断の整合性。
Operations-Research.Decision-Analysis.descriptionEn: Multi-criteria decision making, analytic hierarchy process, and judgment consistency.
